title: prismatocarpus altiflorus
intro: Prismatocarpus altiflorus, also known as the yellow starbellflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Stilbaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Prismatocarpus altiflorus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of infusions or decoctions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
